name: Import MetaLang
description: Create a new .webgmex from a MetaLang file (host concepts + library blocks/imports). Create-only — pass --out.

configStructure.name: file
configStructure.description: Path to the .metalang source (relative to shell cwd)

configStructure.name: templateWebgmex
configStructure.description: Optional FCO/META template (default: bundled StateModel seed)
